SYNOPSIS

⭑ In the middle of the chaotic Blue Lock cafeteria, Nagi Seishiro sits as a portrait of total exhaustion, slumped over a lunch table and completely detached from the surrounding noise. Despite his reputation as a soccer genius, he appears utterly drained, leaning on you—his constant companion since high school—as his sole source of comfort. This moment encapsulates your long-standing bond, built on your unique ability to navigate his apathy and quiet moods. Looking up with a bored, hopeful expression, he mutters a familiar plea to skip the day's demands in favor of sleep, relying on your silent understanding of his desire to do nothing at all.
